name: usage-card
title: Fuse UsageCard
description: Fuse-canon usage meter composing BillUI's static UsageCard* subcomponents (Path B per fuse-web decision-log 2026-05-15 EVENING). Renders tenant-scoped credit balance with a horizontal progress bar whose fill color tracks remaining percentage per the 3-stop threshold palette (plum-9 >20% / sand-11 ≤20% / destructive ≤5%; HR 2 no semantic green). 3 render states: internal account bypass / zero-state (brand-new org pre-cron) / normal (meter + period + per-operation_type breakdown). Live SWR refresh wrapper polls /api/billing/balance every 30s. 2px rounded-sm inset-rail shape overrides BillUI's rounded-full default to preserve audit-locked track shape (HR 23 step 5 grep gate exempts rounded-full but visually regresses canonical track). Source: fuse-web components/billing/usage-card.tsx + V-close 2.0.9 PR #697.
